name: Chocolate Board Game Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat margarine and sugar until fluffy.
2. Blend in sour cream, eggs, chocolate, and vanilla.
3. Add combined dry ingredients alternately with milk, mixing well after each addition.
4. Pour batter into a greased and floured 13 x 9-inch baking pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 40 to 45 minutes or until a wooden toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Cool completely.
7. Frost with Creamy Rum Frosting.
8. Decorate as desired.
